name: vertical
_comment: Vertical theme (True Vertical Scroll) — all slides stacked, sticky top bar, IntersectionObserver tracking, TOC drawer navigation. v3.0.0: initial release.
description: True vertical scroll presentation where all slides are stacked in a scrollable page. Sticky top bar provides TTS controls, auto-advance, timer, progress, and arrow navigation. IntersectionObserver tracks active slide. TOC drawer for headline navigation. Ideal for long-form content and reading-style presentations.

rendering.navigation: sticky top bar — TOC drawer + prev/next arrows + TTS controls + auto-advance + timer + progress bar
rendering.progress_indicator: progress bar (top bar) + slide counter + active slide highlight (inset accent border)

content_rules.notes: Vertical scroll suits long-form content. Titles up to 28 chars. Max 5 bullets per slide. All slide types supported. Works well with 30+ slides for deep-dive presentations. Keyboard: ArrowUp/Down, PageUp/PageDown, Home/End, Space.

recommended_structure.pattern: Cover → Speaker Intro → [Part Divider → 8-12 Content → Summary] × N → Contact
recommended_structure.notes: Long-form vertical layout supports deep dives. Each section flows naturally as the user scrolls. TTS with auto-advance enables hands-free presentation.

author: co-deck
